content:
✔ Now that I have confirmed these final additions, I will integrate everything into the final macro structure and present it in an organized, exhaustive format.
✔ This will be the LAST confirmation before we move to syllabus drafting and Canvas setup.

Let me know if you have any last-minute changes before I finalize this! 🚀





📌 Version 4.3 – Comprehensive Macro Framework (Revised & Expanded)


🚀 Finalizing the Macro Structure with All Requested Additions
This update fully integrates all elements into one structured master plan while allowing room for continued iteration.

🎮 1. Expanded RPG Character System

Each student creates an avatar based on reading, storytelling, or intellectual archetypes.
• They choose (or create) a character in Week 1 and develop it throughout the semester.
• XP System: Weekly assignments and achievements level up their character.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 5 (chunk 5/555)
